revision_priority: Split the Skills section into shorter categories so each line stays under 14 words.
Remove bold from modifier phrases like "team-maintained" and keep emphasis only on technologies and metrics.
revision_instructions: Revise only the Skills formatting and bolding hygiene. Rework ## Skills into shorter, ATS-friendly categories with every line under 14 words; keep the same technologies, but move items like PostgreSQL/MySQL/Redis out of the broad Cloud line and distribute stacks into narrower labels such as Languages, Backend, Data/ML, Datastores, and Infra/CI. Then audit the TikTok project bullets and de-bold any modifier or qualifier words such as "team-maintained" while preserving bold for technologies, metrics, and section labels only. No broader rewrite is needed.
